```{r}
         complete_date = as.Date(`Completion Date`),
         activation_date = as.Date(`Match Activation Date`)) %>%
  dplyr::select(match_id, call_order, complete_date, activation_date) 

individual_cadence_test <- cadence_test %>% 
  mutate(cadence = ifelse(call_order == 1,
                                      as.numeric(complete_date - first(activation_date)),
                                      as.numeric(complete_date - lag(complete_date))),
         days_since_activation = as.numeric(complete_date - first(activation_date))) %>% 
  mutate(period = ifelse(days_since_activation <= 365, "Early", "Late")) %>% 
  ungroup()
  
avg_cadence_test <- individual_cadence_test %>% 
  group_by(match_id) %>% 
  summarize(early_cadence = if(sum(period == "Early") > 0)
    round(mean(cadence[period == "Early"]), 2) else NA_real_,
    late_cadence = if(sum(period == "Late") > 0)
    round(mean(cadence[period == "Late"]), 2) else NA_real_,
    average_cadence = round(mean(cadence), 2),
    total_calls = n()
    ) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  mutate(bin_cadence = case_when(
    average_cadence < 25 ~ "< 25",
    average_cadence >= 25 & average_cadence < 50 ~ "[25, 50)",
    average_cadence >= 50 & average_cadence < 75 ~ "[50, 75)",
    average_cadence >= 75 & average_cadence < 100 ~ "[75, 100)",
    average_cadence >= 100 ~ ">= 100"
  )) %>% 
  mutate(bin_cadence = factor(bin_cadence, levels = c("< 25", "[25, 50)", 
                                                      "[50, 75)", "[75, 100)",
                                                      ">= 100")))





msc_notes_test <- bbbs_test %>% 
  dplyr::select(match_id, `Completion Date`, `Match Activation Date`, `Match Support Contact Notes`) %>% 
  drop_na(`Match Support Contact Notes`) %>% 
  filter(!(match_id %in% id_with_incomplete_completion_test)) %>% 
  arrange(match_id, `Completion Date`) %>% 
  mutate(complete_date = as.Date(`Completion Date`),
         activation_date = as.Date(`Match Activation Date`)) %>%
  rename(notes = `Match Support Contact Notes`) %>% 
  dplyr::select(match_id, notes, complete_date, activation_date) %>% 
  group_by(match_id) %>% 
  mutate(days_since_activation = as.numeric(complete_date - first(activation_date))) %>% 
  mutate(period = ifelse(days_since_activation <= 365, "Early", "Late")) %>% 
  ungroup()


sentiment_notes_test <- msc_notes_test %>% 
  mutate(notes = tolower(notes)) %>% 
  mutate(notes = str_replace_all(
    notes,
    c("b_first_name" = "big", "l_first_name" = "little", "b_last_name" = "big", "l_last_name" = "little",
      "bs" = "big", "bb" = "big", "ls" = "little", "lb" = "little", "question:" = "", "activities:" = "", "answer:" = "", "child safety:" = "",
      "child development:" = "", "child/volunteer relationship development:" = "", "relationship with bbbs:" = "",
      "relationship with bigbig:" = "", "parent/volunteer concerns:" = "", "mss notes:" = "", "https://bbbsgtc.as.me/MCS" = "")
  )) %>% 
  mutate(notes = str_trim(notes)) %>% 
  mutate(sentiment = sentiment_by(notes)$ave_sentiment)

sentiment_match_test <- sentiment_by(sentiment_notes_test$notes, by = sentiment_notes_test$match_id)



```


```{r dotest}
test <- bbbs_test %>% 
  #rename(match_id = `Match ID 18Char`) %>% 
  mutate(`Program Type` = ifelse(`Program Type` == "Site Based Plus", "Site", `Program Type`)) %>%
  mutate(`Program Type` = ifelse(`Program Type` == "Site Based Facilitated", "Site", `Program Type`)) %>% 
  mutate(start_year = as.factor(year(`Match Activation Date`))) %>% 
  group_by(match_id) %>% 
  summarize(total_checkins = n(), program_type = first(`Program Type`),
            start_year = first(start_year)) %>% 
  left_join(trunc_test_gender %>% dplyr::select(match_id, `Same Gender`), by = "match_id") %>% 
  left_join(trunc_test %>% dplyr::select(match_id, `Age Difference`), by = "match_id") %>% 
  left_join(trunc_test_race %>% dplyr::select(match_id, `Same Race`), by = "match_id") %>% 
  left_join(trunc_test_edu %>% dplyr::select(match_id, education_level), by = "match_id") %>%
  left_join(trunc_test_rship %>% dplyr::select(match_id, relationship_status), by = "match_id") %>% 
  left_join(trunc_test_occ %>% dplyr::select(match_id, `Big Occupation`), by = "match_id") %>% 
  left_join(trunc_test_former %>% dplyr::select(match_id, past_exp), by = "match_id") %>% 
  left_join(trunc_test_lang %>% dplyr::select(match_id, Language_Alignment), by = "match_id") %>% 
  left_join(trunc_test_interests %>% dplyr::select(match_id, interest_level), by = c("match_id")) %>%
  left_join(distance_geo_test %>% dplyr::select(`Match ID 18Char`, distance_km), by = c("match_id" = "Match ID 18Char")) %>% 
  left_join(avg_cadence_test %>% dplyr::select(match_id, average_cadence), by = "match_id") %>% 
  left_join(sentiment_match_test %>% dplyr::select(match_id, ave_sentiment), by = "match_id")


test <- test %>% 
  dplyr::select(-relationship_status,-distance_km,-total_checkins)

test$ave_sentiment[is.na(test$ave_sentiment)] <- mean(test$ave_sentiment, na.rm = T)
test$average_cadence[is.na(test$average_cadence)] <- mean(test$average_cadence, na.rm = T)


library(mice)

test$`Big Occupation` <- as.factor(test$`Big Occupation`)

imputed_data <- mice(test, m = 5, method = "rf", seed = 3431)



# Get the completed data
test_complete <- complete(imputed_data)


sapply(first_pass, function(x) (sum(is.na(x))))





train <- first_pass %>% 
  filter(Stage == "Closed") %>% 
  dplyr::select(-match_id, -total_checkins, -relationship_status, -distance_km, -education_level, -length_cat)
  
train$`Big Occupation` <- as.factor(train$`Big Occupation`)
imputed_data <- mice(train, m = 7, method = "rf", seed = 4050)

  
train_complete <- complete(imputed_data)

split <- initial_split(train_complete, prop = c(0.3))
train_data <- split %>%
  training()

test_data <- split %>%
  testing()

install.packages("AER")
library(AER)


tobit_model <- tobit(match_length ~ average_cadence + start_year + `Age Difference` + `Same Race` + program_type + `Big Occupation` 
                     + ave_sentiment + interest_level + Language_Alignment,
                     left = -Inf,
                     right = 0,
                     data = train_data)

summary(tobit_model)

test_data$predicted_length <- predict(tobit_model, newdata = test_data, type = "response")

# ----------------------------
# Step 5: Evaluate Model Performance (RMSE)
# ----------------------------
# RMSE can be calculated once the true match lengths for test data are known.
# For demonstration, we use the observed (censored) match_length.
rmse <- sqrt(mean((test_data$match_length - test_data$predicted_length)^2, na.rm = TRUE))
cat("Test RMSE:", rmse, "\n")

ggplot(test_data, aes(x = match_length, y = predicted_length)) +
  geom_point(color = "blue", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Tobit Regression: Predicted vs.\nActual Match Length",
       x = "Observed (Censored) Match Length (days)",
       y = "Predicted Match Length (days)")
```
  
  
```{r}
unique(test$start_year)



first_pass$ave_sentiment[is.na(first_pass$ave_sentiment)] <- mean(first_pass$ave_sentiment, na.rm = T)
first_pass$average_cadence[is.na(first_pass$average_cadence)] <- mean(first_pass$average_cadence, na.rm = T)


first_pass


train$`Big Occupation` <- as.factor(train$`Big Occupation`)
imputed_data <- mice(train, m = 7, method = "rf", seed = 4050)

# Get the completed data
train_complete <- complete(imputed_data)

summary(lm(match_length ~ ., data = train_complete[,-1]))



write_csv(train_complete, "train.csv")
write_csv(test_complete, "test.csv")


split <- initial_split(train_complete, prop = c(0.3))
train_data <- split %>%
  training()

test_data <- split %>%
  testing()



set.seed(2521)

y <- train_data$match_length
x <- data.matrix(train_data[, colnames(train_data)[3:ncol(train_data)]])

# LASSO - Feature selection
cv_model <- cv.glmnet(x, y, alpha = 1)
best_lambda <- cv_model$lambda.min
plot(cv_model)

# Feature selection: According to best_lambda, we can exclude the '.' variables (these got reduced to 0)
coefficient_model <- coef(glmnet(x, y, alpha = 1, lambda = best_lambda))
selected_features <- rownames(coefficient_model)[coefficient_model@i[-1] + 1]

selected_features

formula_model <- as.formula(paste("match_length ~ 1 +", paste(selected_features, collapse = " + ")))
model_lm <- lm(match_length ~ 1 + average_cadence + program_type + start_year + `Same Gender` + `Age Difference` + `Big Occupation` + interest_level + ave_sentiment, data = train_data) %>%
  stepAIC(direction = "both", trace = F)
summary(model_lm)


model_lm <- lm(match_length ~ ., data = train_data[, -1])
summary(model_lm)

vif(model_lm)




```
